name: reserve_tentative
description: Called when a caller expresses intent to book an appointment. Captures the initial booking details and creates a tentative record in the CRM. Always call this as soon as booking intent is confirmed — before collecting full details.

tenant_id.description: The client tenant identifier. Always set to the fixed value for this agent.

preferred_date.description: The caller's preferred date for the appointment (e.g. 'next Tuesday', '27th of May', 'tomorrow'). Use the caller's exact words.

preferred_time.description: The caller's preferred time (e.g. 'morning', '10am', 'after 2pm'). Use the caller's exact words.

service_type.description: The type of service or appointment requested (e.g. 'logbook service', 'check-up', 'initial consultation')

caller_name.description: The caller's name if already provided at this point. Leave empty if not yet given.
